name: Failed registration due to already registered email
scenarioId: autenticacion/registro_usuario:Failed registration due to already registered email
methodName: Failed registration due to already registered email

testSteps.description: Given I am on the registration page
When I register with email "andrea.marin1713@gmail.com", password "Pass123!" and confirm password "Pass123!"

children.description: Usuario enters 'Pass123!' into input confirmar password

testSteps.description: Then the system displays the message "El correo ya está registrado"

children.description: Then mensaje alerta should be a string containing 'El correo ya está registrado'
